description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system (admin login: http://localhost:8000/admin/, username: admin, password: adminpass123). Register a new drone model 'Nile Scout 200' (category: ROTORCRAFT, sub-category: Multirotor, series: '2024.1', mass: 1200, max certified takeoff weight: 1.500, max speed: 15) linked to the existing Type Certificate. The registration must include a 'Complete' Aircraft Assembly for the model and an 'Active' Aircraft named 'NS-001' (operator: Electric Inspection, manufacturer: Aerobridge Drone Company, flight controller ID: NSCTRL112233) using that assembly.
